name: Mirror Abyss / 镜渊
validation: ES Module parse/import, priority transport release, strict stream-fallback regression, stream aggregation, deployment syntax/version and ZIP integrity checks
limitations: Original TypeScript project, package manifest and full source test suite were not present in the uploaded deploy archive.
fixes: restrict non-stream fallback to explicit Connection Profile stream contract and unsupported-interface failures
never retry ordinary upstream, HTTP, network, parse, cancellation or stale failures as non-stream requests
exclude the stale unreproducible source map from deployment archives
record model-call queue, transport, first-data, response, parse and persistence timing without prompt or response content
replace per-profile FIFO with a bounded priority scheduler
limit each profile to two requests and derived summaries to one slot while serializing calls from the same chat
move derived summaries out of the critical fact-extraction task tail
aggregate native Connection Profile streams before parsing with one compatibility fallback
disable automatic history rebuild by default
perform local consistency detection only when entering or switching chats
record detected history changes non-destructively without calling the model API
pause table, summary and lorebook derivation until the player starts manual rebuild
add an opt-in automatic history rebuild setting
change edit, delete and swipe handling to detect-and-prompt when automatic rebuild is disabled
keep existing memory intact until manual rebuild connection preflight succeeds
show a dedicated history-change pending status instead of a fake running progress bar
preserve adaptive extraction, model routing, admission, event memory and lorebook consistency behavior
